'''鈭歳-m-th-sh''' ('''karamtheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumourmonger|rumourmonger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumourmonger|rumourmonger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-m-th-sh
|-
! Lemma
| karamtheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiramtheshoko|thiramtheshoko]] || [[word:jiramtheshoko|jiramtheshoko]] || [[word:shiramtheshoko|shiramtheshoko]] || [[word:kiramtheshoko|kiramtheshoko]]
